message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  ParticipantBorderThickness 2
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ArrowColor #777777
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor user as U
participant "Wrapper" as W
participant "wrapped" as R

U -> W : 1 predict(X)
activate W

W -> W : 2 validate; strip
W -> R : 3 predict(Xt)
activate R
R --> W : 4 yt
deactivate R
W -> W : 5 add metadata
W --> U : 6 y
deactivate W

@enduml
